channel.title: box on Dr. Soumyo Maity
channel.description: Recent content in box on Dr. Soumyo Maity

item.title: Grey Box Testing
item.description: What is Grey Box Testing? Grey box testing is a type of software testing that combines elements of black box testing and white box testing. In black box testing, the tester has no knowledge of the internal workings of the software being tested. In white box testing, the tester has full knowledge of the internal workings of the software being tested. Grey box testing falls somewhere in between these two extremes.
